requestStatus.title: Request Status
requestStatus.description: The status of the service catalog request creation action, showing whether it was successful or if errors occurred during the process.

createdTicket.title: Created Ticket
createdTicket.description: The ticket created by the action. This is only populated if the action was successful.

requiredAttributes.title: Required Attributes
requiredAttributes.description: A list of required attributes that were not provided or contained invalid data.
